heading: Membership
label: 200303 Membership
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20030336:535., .Aug. 20, 1954, ch. 774, § 568 Stat. 750In subsection (a), the words “are as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation” are substituted for “shall . . . be determined as the constitution and bylaws of the corporation may provide” for consistency in the revised title.In subsection (b)(1), the words “at any time” are added for clarity.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20030336:535., .Aug. 20, 1954, ch. 774, § 568 Stat. 750In subsection (a), the words “are as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation” are substituted for “shall . . . be determined as the constitution and bylaws of the corporation may provide” for consistency in the revised title.In subsection (b)(1), the words “at any time” are added for clarity.

children.heading: .—General
children.label: a .—General
children.text: Except as provided in this chapter, eligibility for membership in the corporation and the rights, privileges, and designation of classes of members are as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation.

children.label: A
children.text: the United States Army, Navy, Marine Corps, or Revenue-Cutter Service; or

children.label: B
children.text: a State regiment that was called into active service and was subject to orders of United States general officers during that period; and
was discharged honorably from, or died in, that service.
